subject: All lanes have completed assigned tasks: system-wide task completion verified, Kernel lane maintenance done
body:
All lanes have completed their assigned tasks as per the SwarmMind summary:
- Archivist: CONTRADICTION_SIGNATURE_39 adjudication (17 nodes) evidenced by docs/graph/CONTRADICTION_DELTA_REPORT_2026-04-30.md
- Kernel: Inbox processing + recovery verification (11/11 PASS) evidenced by evidence/graph-snapshots/maintenance-log-20260430T183002.md
- Library: Graph work-path analysis (3,771 nodes, 7 buckets) + accessibility deploy evidenced by reports/graph-work-path-2026-04-30.json
- SwarmMind: System audit, quarantine cleanup (72→0), broadcast delivery evidenced by docs/system-state/SYSTEM_STATE_REPORT_2026-04-30.md

All system-wide deliverables are present and verified:
- SYSTEM_STATE_REPORT_2026-04-30.md
- CONTRADICTION_DELTA_REPORT_2026-04-30.md
- graph-work-path-2026-04-30.json
- maintenance-log-20260430T183002.md

Code & automation validated, broadcasts delivered, health & compliance metrics all PASS.

Kernel lane has completed its maintenance tasks: processed inbox items, ran recovery-preflight.js --with-recovery (11/11 PASS, RECOVERY PROVEN), and verified local health.

System state is fully consistent across all 4 lanes with independent convergence gates documented. Ready for next phase.
